fonts.usage: H1, H2, Hero Text, Rank Titles. Gives a punchy, Web3/Gaming feel.
Body text, navigation, buttons, feature descriptions.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, and py-24 for main sections to give breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For the Server Features, use MODE A 'Tetris Grid' (cols-1 md:cols-12, wide gaps).
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons.

cards.classes: bg-[#0C0C16] border border-white/5 shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 hover:shadow-[#3D5CFF]/10

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50. Logo on left, links center, Login/Profile right. Must be visible on desktop.
components_strategy.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]). Centered content. Heavy use of text-shadow. Main CTA is a 'Copy IP' button showing 'Coming soon'.
components_strategy.shop: Three distinct columns for VIP, ORO, Diamond. Use the respective accent colors for their glow. PayPal button prominently at the bottom of each.
components_strategy.auth_modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for Login/Register. Form inputs must use Shadcn. Keep background solid #0C0C16 inside modal.
components_strategy.dashboard: Bento style dashboard for user profile, showing avatar, join date, ranks, and a tabbed view (Shadcn Tabs) for Stats vs Purchase History.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have distinct hover states (e.g., bg-brand-primary hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
motion_and_interactions.copy_ip: When 'Copy IP' is clicked, trigger a Sonner toast notification: 'IP Copied! LUNARMC.COM'.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer motion stagger children for the bento grid features.

hero_bg.usage: Background for Hero section with a heavy bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text readability.

feature_diamond.usage: Visual accent for the Diamond rank card or magic feature

feature_gold.usage: Visual accent for the ORO rank card

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over gradients/images uses text-shadow or solid dark backdrops.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='copy-ip-button', data-testid='buy-diamond-rank-button', data-testid='login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Unbounded and Outfit fonts in the index.css/tailwind config.
2. Implement a responsive navbar with Crystal Glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl).
3. Build the Hero Section with the provided starry night image as background and the LunarMC Logo. Include the 'Copy IP' button.
4. Create the 'Features' section using the Mode A 'Tetris Grid' layout. Use high padding.
5. Build the Shop/VIP section with 3 distinct tiers (VIP, ORO, Diamond). Each must have distinct coloring and a Mocked PayPal button.
6. Build a Shadcn Dialog for the Login/Register flow.
7. Create a User Dashboard view (can be a route or a state) that shows player stats and purchase history using Shadcn Tabs.
8. Ensure the entire design adheres strictly to the dark theme with neon/magical accents. Avoid plain white backgrounds.
